sentences.text: we by written by sarah gusson illustrated by guy wallick
focused question what can you buy at a store
we go to a store mom buys food
we go to a store i buy candy
we go to a store dad buys clothes
we go to a store i buy toys
we go to a store mom buys tools
we go to a store i buy crayons
we go to a store dad buys furniture
we need more money we go to the bank

connections writing and art what would you buy at a store draw a picture and write about it social studies people by things they want and things they need which of the things in this book do people need which things do people want share your ideas with the class
